chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt.Petition No.D-703 of 2021. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections ‘A’. 2. For orders on M.A No.4158/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 30.05.2023 Mr. Suhail Ahmed Veesar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Munawar Ali Abbasi, A.A.G. Mr. Ghulam Asghar Khichi, D.A.G. =*=*=*=*=*=*=*=*= The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for direction against the NADRA for unblocking his blocked CNIC. As per comments filed by NADRA, the petitioner is proclaimed offender in FIR Crime No.128/2013, U/S.3/4 of Explosive Substance Act r/w Section 6/7 ATA, 1997 of P.S Civil Line and it is reason for blocking his CNIC. It is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that the parentage of the person who is absconding in above said case is different to the petitioner. Be that as it may, no factual controversy could be resolved by this Court. The petitioner to satisfy the Court about his parentage and innocence where his case is pending, with request to order for unblocking his blocked CNIC in accordance with law, if so is advised to him. The instant petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
